qaPairs.question: Hi
qaPairs.answer: Hi — I can help you get started with Rescue Transit. Are you looking to foster, help transport, or learn how the platform works?

qaPairs.question: How do I become a foster?
qaPairs.answer: To become a foster, you'll need to create an account and submit a short application. Once approved, you'll be able to view animals needing temporary care and request placements.

qaPairs.question: What happens after I apply?
qaPairs.answer: Most applications are reviewed within 24–48 hours. Once your application is reviewed, you will receive a notification regarding your status.

qaPairs.question: How do I receive an animal?
qaPairs.answer: After approval, you can browse animals needing foster care on the platform. You can request a placement, and once the shelter confirms, the transport will be coordinated.

qaPairs.question: How do transports work?
qaPairs.answer: Rescue Transit coordinates transport through volunteer drivers. Transports are broken into segments, and volunteers sign up for specific legs of the journey.

qaPairs.question: Do I have to drive long distances?
qaPairs.answer: No. Most drivers help with short segments—often just 1–2 hours. You can choose transports that fit your schedule and preferred distance.

qaPairs.question: How do I sign up to help transport?
qaPairs.answer: You can register as a driver on the platform. Once your profile is ready, you can view available transport legs in your area and claim the ones you are available for.

qaPairs.question: How do I post an animal?
qaPairs.answer: Registered shelters can log in to their dashboard to create a listing for an animal, including photos, medical needs, and destination requirements.

qaPairs.question: How are transports coordinated?
qaPairs.answer: The platform automatically calculates the best route and breaks it into manageable segments for volunteer drivers to claim.

qaPairs.question: How does vet approval work?
qaPairs.answer: Animals must have the necessary health certificates and vet clearances uploaded to the platform before transport can be finalized to ensure the safety of all animals involved.

qaPairs.question: What is Rescue Transit?
qaPairs.answer: Rescue Transit is a platform that connects shelters, fosters, and transport drivers to move animals from overcrowded shelters to places where they have capacity.

qaPairs.question: How does this platform work?
qaPairs.answer: It acts as a coordination hub that helps track animal movement, manage foster placements, and match volunteer drivers with transport needs to save more lives.

qaPairs.question: Is the platform safe?
qaPairs.answer: Yes. All participants, including fosters, drivers, and shelters, are reviewed to help ensure safe and responsible placements and transport for animals.

fallbacks.medical_approval_placement: For that, please contact the shelter or support team.
fallbacks.unsure_outofscope: I'm not sure about that, but I can connect you with the right information. You can contact support at smckearin@gmail.com
